testcase.name: testLoginTimeout
testcase.failure: java.net.SocketTimeoutException: Connection timed out after 5000ms at sun.net.www.http.HttpClient.parseHTTPHeader(HttpClient.java:792) at com.example.api.AuthTest.testLoginTimeout(AuthTest.java:42)

testcase.name: testGetUserProfile
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Expected status code <200> but was <401> Response body: {"error":"invalid_token","message":"Token has been revoked or is malformed"} at io.restassured.internal.ValidatableResponseImpl.statusCode(ValidatableResponseImpl.java:106) at com.example.api.AuthTest.testGetUserProfile(AuthTest.java:67)
